---
title: "The ‘Perverse Widow’: Being Passages from the Life of Catharina, wife of William Boevey . . . . with genealogical notes on that family and others connected therewith"
---

## The ‘Perverse Widow’: Being Passages from the Life of Catharina, wife of William Boevey . . . . with genealogical notes on that family and others connected therewith

**Author:** Arthur William Crawley Boevey
**Date:** 1898
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
